SELECT
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
     SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
         AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
         AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) AS sub
     GROUP BY Segment
   ) AS seg_avg WHERE Segment='SME')
  -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
     SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
         AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
         AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) AS sub
     GROUP BY Segment
   ) AS seg_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') AS SME_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
     SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
         AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
         AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) AS sub
     GROUP BY Segment
   ) AS seg_avg WHERE Segment='LAM')
  -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
     SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
         AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
         AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) AS sub
     GROUP BY Segment
   ) AS seg_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') AS LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
     SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
         AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
         AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) AS sub
     GROUP BY Segment
   ) AS seg_avg WHERE Segment='KAM')
  -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
     SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
         AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
         AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) AS sub
     GROUP BY Segment
   ) AS seg_avg WHERE Segment='SME') AS KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT 'biggest' AS type, Segment, pct FROM (
  SELECT y1.Segment,
         ((y2.total - y1.total)/y1.total)*100.0 AS pct
  FROM (
    SELECT c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
  ) y1
  JOIN (
    SELECT c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
  ) y2 ON y1.Segment = y2.Segment
  WHERE y1.yr = '2012' AND y2.yr = '2013'
) ORDER BY pct DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lowest' AS type, Segment, pct FROM (
  SELECT y1.Segment,
         ((y2.total - y1.total)/y1.total)*100.0 AS pct
  FROM (
    SELECT c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
  ) y1
  JOIN (
    SELECT c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
  ) y2 ON y1.Segment = y2.Segment
  WHERE y1.yr = '2012' AND y2.yr = '2013'
) ORDER BY pct ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

    WHEN in_male < out_male THEN 'Outpatient'

SELECT l.account_id, (h.max_avg - l.avg_salary) AS gap
FROM (
    SELECT account_id, avg_salary
    FROM (
        SELECT account_id, AVG(amount) AS avg_salary
        FROM trans
        GROUP BY account_id
    ) AS avg_salaries
    WHERE account_id IN (
        SELECT d.account_id
        FROM disp d
        JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
        WHERE c.gender = 'F'
          AND ((julianday('now') - julianday(c.birth_date)) / 365.25) = (
                SELECT MAX((julianday('now') - julianday(birth_date)) / 365.25)
                FROM client
                WHERE gender = 'F'
              )
    )
    ORDER BY avg_salary ASC
    LIMIT 1
) AS l
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg
    FROM (
        SELECT account_id, AVG(amount) AS avg_salary
        FROM trans
        GROUP BY account_id
    ) AS all_avg
) AS h;	----- bird -----	financial

FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN (
    SELECT a2.account_id, AVG(l.payments) AS avg_pay
    FROM account a2

    JOIN client c2 ON d2.client_id = c2.client_id
    JOIN loan l ON a2.account_id = l.account_id

) ap ON a.account_id = ap.account_id

        JOIN client c3 ON d3.client_id = c3.client_id
        JOIN loan l ON a3.account_id = l.account_id
